meta.title: Estime Vangu — Frontend & Product Engineer
meta.description: Frontend-focused developer building modern web applications with a strong emphasis on product thinking, performance, and user experience.

hero.name: Estime Vangu
hero.role: Frontend Engineer with a product mindset
hero.intro: I build modern web products starting from the frontend, combining UX, product logic, and technical execution into usable, scalable applications.

meta.title: Home

ProjectsScreen.title: Projects
ProjectsScreen.placeholder: Case studies and selected projects will appear here.

meta.title: Projects
meta.description: Selected projects and case studies — Estime Vangu.

paragraphs: I build modern web applications with a product-oriented frontend approach.
I mainly work on SaaS, B2B, and internal tools where frontend execution directly shapes day-to-day use.

productMindset.title: Product mindset
intro: Understand the real need before the technical solution. Decide early, ship focused MVPs, keep a clear trajectory.
No superfluous features: a foundation that can grow without over-complicating too soon.
productMindset.outro: Every decision should answer a concrete use case, not a feature checklist.

frontendPhilosophy.title: Frontend philosophy
intro: Frontend sets a product’s rhythm, fluidity, and perception — not just the screen.
frontendPhilosophy.outro: Interfaces that read quickly and move without friction.

buildingApplications.title: What I build
intro: Tools built for real contexts: business workflows, daily use, product logic behind the screen.
buildingApplications.outro: Real-world usage guides what we ship, not the other way around.

technicalApproach.title: Technical approach
intro: Simple, component-oriented architectures with coherent UI systems.
technicalApproach.outro: Technology should serve the product, not the other way around.

motionInteraction.title: Motion & interaction
intro: Animation and micro-interactions for hierarchy and fluidity — never for decoration.
motionInteraction.outro: Discreet, useful motion aligned with the rest of the interface.

collaborationExecution.title: Collaboration & execution
intro: Clear communication, sharp priorities, concrete progress.
collaborationExecution.outro: Serious products, well scoped, shipped cleanly.

closing.label: In short
paragraphs: SaaS, B2B, and modern tools with real product thinking.
Products built to last, evolve, and stay simple to use every day.

meta.title: Profile
meta.description: Product approach, frontend philosophy, and execution — Estime Vangu, product-oriented frontend engineer.
